name: Ubiquiti airPRISM 3x30° HD Sector
title: Ubiquiti airPRISM 3x30° HD Sector
short_description: airPrism® Sector Antenna, 5GHz, 22dBi, 3x30° pair with Rocket 5ac Prism
description: airPrism® Sector Antenna, 5GHz, 22dBi, 3x30° pair with Rocket 5ac Prism

detailed_description.heading: Groundbreaking Product
detailed_description.text: The HD Sector Antenna AirPrism 5GHz, is a groundbreaking product from Ubiquiti Networks, embodying the company's commitment to advancing wireless network performance and efficiency. This high-density sector antenna is a pivotal component in the deployment of Point-to-MultiPoint (PtMP) applications, particularly designed for use in the 5 GHz frequency band, which is commonly congested and highly susceptible to interference in densely populated wireless environments.

detailed_description.heading: Noise Isolation & Beam Performance
detailed_description.text: The airPrism antenna features significant advances in noise isolation and beam performance to complement the Rocket®5ac Prism™ radios (not included) for co-location deployments.

detailed_description.heading: AirPrism Technology
detailed_description.text: Ubiquiti Networks has meticulously engineered the AP-5AC-90-HD to meet the rigorous demands of modern wireless networks, integrating AirPrism technology to significantly reduce interference. This technology enables the antenna to deliver clearer and more reliable signals, a critical factor for achieving high throughput in multi-point networks. The antenna's unique configuration, featuring three 30° sector antennas combined into one unit, allows network operators to precisely target signals, enhancing coverage and reducing the overlap that can lead to interference.

detailed_description.heading: High-Density Capabilities
detailed_description.text: The antenna's performance is further enhanced by its high-density capabilities, designed to support the demands of heavy user traffic without sacrificing speed or reliability. This makes the AP-5AC-90-HD an ideal solution for applications requiring high capacity, such as video streaming, large-scale events, or any scenario where high-speed internet access is critical.

detailed_description.heading: Thoughtful Design
detailed_description.text: The AP-5AC-90-HD stands out not only for its technical capabilities but also for its thoughtful design. It boasts a compact and efficient form factor, facilitating its integration into various outdoor settings without being obtrusive. This design consideration is crucial for urban deployments and other environments where space and aesthetics are significant concerns. Additionally, the antenna's construction is robust, ensuring it can withstand harsh weather conditions, including intense sun, wind, and rain, making it a reliable choice for long-term outdoor use.

detailed_description.heading: Ease of Installation
detailed_description.text: Ease of installation is another hallmark of the HD Sector Antenna AirPrism 5GHz, 3x30°. Ubiquiti has equipped it with everything needed for a straightforward setup process, allowing for rapid deployment without the need for extensive technical expertise. This ease of installation, coupled with the antenna's compatibility with other Ubiquiti devices, makes it an attractive option for network administrators looking to expand or enhance their wireless networks with minimal disruption.
